title: 3 Rolls 30ft Mesh Glitter Decorative Ribbon, Metallic Foil Decorative Webbing, Glitter Reel Ribbon, Party Bunting DIY Garland (White (Silver Thread), Black, Red and White Stripe)
features: Superior material: made of high quality polypropylene and metal foil, using vertical and horizontal process weaving technology, not easy to deform, firm, waterproof, soft touch, durable and reusable, dazzling and bright colours are not easy to fade or break. When not in use, it can be stored in a box without taking up space.

Shiny and eye-catching: sufficient quantity can be freely cut, shaped and folded. DIY crafts that you can make with your friends or family and leave wonderful memories. It is worth mentioning that the shiny metallic foil tulle webbing can dazzle to show off your craftsmanship and make your handmade work stand out.

EXCELLENT QUALITY: Excellent drape and neat edges, the tulle decorative rolls are designed with mesh, making the tulle fabric tightly and compactly woven, keeping the drape and shape when making wreaths or decorative gifts. The edges of the webbing are made smooth with sewn edges, which does not hurt your hands and is clean and tidy, there will not be any loose threads that will affect the display of your work!

FLEXIBLE TO USE: Our decorative webbing is soft and flexible, you are free to twist, stretch, bend and shape it into any shape you want, it can also be used to decorate vases, columns, arches, railings and centrepieces. Ideal for making garlands and bows.

WIDE APPLICATION: Decorative woven wire mesh is lightweight and flexible, can be used for decorating home, office, yard, wedding, decorative wreaths, Christmas trees, DIY handicrafts, bows and wrapping gifts, gift baskets, crafts home decoration projects, making your thoughts more beautiful and exuding charming charms!
